chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-406 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.1946/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.1947/2024 (Exemption). 3. For order on CMA No.1948/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 29th January 2024 Ms. Bushra Zia alongwith Ms. Motia Sikandar, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. We have heard the learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the record of this case. For the reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
